episode_summary: A live-show compilation episode where the team riff through curios from deadly pot-plant amoebas and beauty-pageant infiltration to Festival of Britain gallstone art and the Norwegian army’s secondhand underwear rule, with plenty of detours into nunchucks, acorn-stashing woodpeckers and more.

facts.fact: But in 1988 there was a woman called Michelle Anderson who infiltrated Miss California. She secretly entered Miss California.
If you kind of make pot plants and pot plants in pots, you can die. There was someone who died quite recently in the last 10 years of a brain-eating amoeba that they caught from a pot plant.
It was 604 gold stones that had been removed from a patient, and they coloured them and put them in the shape of the emblem, and then they displayed it at the festival.
My fact this week is that when leaving the Norwegian military, soldiers must now hand over their used underpants and socks for the next recruit to wear.
